subcodes.first_line: Beware lest ye forget courtesy, for a person is known by their conduct and not by their wealth. Take pride in your knowledge and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایاکم ان تنسوا الادب لان المرء یعرف بادابه لا بامواله ان افتخروا بعلمکم و
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @excellence; distinction, @knowledge of self, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
